title: Reservoir Dam Network: Maximizing Dam Frontage Around a Protected Wetland
strategies: bottom-row baseline: N equal disks in a single line along the valley floor (reproduces the checker baseline)
aligned square-grid packing of equal disks with obstacle-cell dropping
hexagonal (offset-row) packing with the largest equal radius that still fits N obstacle-clear disks
boundary/obstacle-aware unequal packing: enlarge corner and wetland-rim reservoirs and fill interstices
